title: Mining In Place
description: Move the farthest block of the vein/tree in front of you to dig the entire vein or tree in place.
body:
Mining in place
=======

一个简单的模组，能够在挖掘成片的同类方块（比如砍树和采矿）时将这片方块中最远的方块不断移动至挖掘位置，使得无需移动位置，站在原地即可一次挖完整片方块。
最终效果类似于各种连锁挖掘，但效率更贴近原版。各项配置可通过游戏内配置界面或配置文件修改。

灵感来源以及Fabric下的同功能模组：[一脉相挖](https://modrinth.com/mod/minepulse/)

A simple mod that keeps moving the furthest square in the patch to the digging position while digging up patches of similar squares (such as cutting down trees and mining), making it possible to dig up the whole patch at once without moving the position, just by standing in place.
The end result is similar to the various chain digs, but more closely resembles the original in terms of efficiency. Configurations can be changed via the in-game configuration screen or configuration file.

Inspiration and same function mod under Fabric: [Mine Pulse](https://modrinth.com/mod/minepulse/)
